chunks.title: The Story of Naboth's Vineyard
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit covering Ahab's request, Jezebel's scheme, and the execution of Naboth.

chunks.title: Elijah's Oracle Against Ahab
chunks.reason: Combines a divine speech to Elijah with the prophet's direct confrontation and judgment against the king.

chunks.title: Ahab's Humiliation and God's Response
chunks.reason: Describes Ahab's reaction to the oracle and the subsequent divine decision regarding the timing of judgment.
